description: Style Notetantra's fresh take on incorporating cool graphic prints into their T-shirts resulted in this piece. Deep tones with a vintage vibe, this is perfect to wear with fitted denims and canvas shoes. Product DetailsBlack T-shirt, has a round neck, short sleeves and has "facebook" graphic print on the front.Material and Care100% cottonMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroiderySize and FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
